acceptance_targets: [ch07-craft-001] In the revised passage at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:141-167, a close reader can track a coherent timestamp sequence in which Rufino is documented as present or under observation before the ketorolac entry. Pass if the record no longer requires the shot at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:163 to occur before the chart says Rufino arrived; fail if the scene still leaves that impossible ordering in place.

[ch07-prose-001] Review the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:133-136, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:237-238, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:315, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:327-328. Pass if no more than one of those beats still uses the chapter's negation-reclassification template and the others achieve the distinction through materially different sentence shapes; fail if the same template still governs most of those moments.

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised passage at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:141-167, a close reader can track a coherent timestamp sequence in which Rufino is documented as present or under observation before the ketorolac entry. Pass if the record no longer requires the shot at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:163 to occur before the chart says Rufino arrived; fail if the scene still leaves that impossible ordering in place.
findings.problem: Paloma's chart lie is procedurally impossible as written. The scene states Rufino's official arrival time is 11:38, then has Paloma write a ketorolac administration at 11:17 and present that as the cover story. In an audit-driven chapter built on timestamp scrutiny, this makes the falsification read sloppy rather than risky, because the chart now appears to record medication twenty-one minutes before the patient officially arrived.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the trauma-room chart beat at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:141-167 so the forged timeline forms a plausible chain of custody. Either change the stated official arrival/observation time to pre-freeze, or show Paloma altering the intake/observation entries on-page before she writes the medication line, so her false record would survive first-pass compliance scrutiny instead of collapsing on internal contradiction.

findings.acceptance_test: Review the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:133-136, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:237-238, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:315, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:327-328. Pass if no more than one of those beats still uses the chapter's negation-reclassification template and the others achieve the distinction through materially different sentence shapes; fail if the same template still governs most of those moments.
findings.problem: The chapter repeats the same negation-then-redefinition sentence construction often enough to become a tic: 'That was worse,' 'It was not formal demotion. It was worse,' 'That was not absolution,' 'It was not hatred... This was colder.' The first use sharpens perception; by the fourth, the chapter starts announcing distinctions through the same template instead of finding fresh sentence pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the repeated formula in the local passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:133-136, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:237-238, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:315, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:327-328. Keep the underlying distinctions, but express at least two of them through direct positive description, changed rhythm, or image-based perception rather than another 'not X / this was Y' pivot.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the novel's uncomfortable overlap of sanitation, state violence, labor dependence, and family love. When an edge case appears, prefer the version that keeps physical consequence, class coercion, and emotional contradiction visible on the page rather than the version that makes characters cleaner, nobler, or easier to forgive.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene turns away at the exact moment bodily, economic, or moral consequence should become legible, revise toward specificity. Omission is only valid when residue, aftermath, and changed behavior keep the pressure fully present.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms should mark emphasis, bureaucracy, class performance, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate dense procedural chapters with quieter aftermath, meals, night holds, confession scenes, and dark-comic institutional theater. No two consecutive chapters should rely on the same rhythm of scene count, dialogue density, or pressure delivery; vary between confrontation, drift, revelation, ritual preparation, humiliation, public spectacle, and stillness under pressure.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, infrastructural, unsentimental, and specific about procedures without becoming jargon-drunk. Abstract thought should rise from physical consequence instead of replacing it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored primarily to Marisol's bodily labor, practical thought, and moral self-management, with any widening kept chapter-level and earned by scene design.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Let long freighted sentences carry labor process, institutional language, or accumulating sensory load; then cut to shorter, grammatically complete sentences at impact points where a body, fact, or decision can no longer be blurred.
